products.name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
products.description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and foldable design. Perfect for travel and work.

products.name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
products.description: TKL layout mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red switches, RGB backlighting, and aluminum top case.

products.name: USB-C 4-Port Hub
products.description: Compact USB-C hub with 4K HDMI, 2x USB-A 3.0, USB-C PD 100W pass-through, and SD/microSD card reader.

products.name: Running Sneakers – Men's
products.description: Lightweight breathable mesh runners with responsive foam midsole. Available in sizes 7–13. Great for road and trail.

products.name: Classic Canvas Sneakers
products.description: Timeless low-top canvas sneakers with vulcanized rubber sole. Pairs with anything in your wardrobe.

products.name: Leather Chelsea Boots
products.description: Full-grain leather Chelsea boots with elastic side panels, stacked heel, and rubber lug sole for all-day comfort.

products.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 1L
products.description: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle keeps drinks cold 24h / hot 12h. BPA-free, leak-proof lid, fits most cup holders.

products.name: Non-Stick Frying Pan 28cm
products.description: Ceramic non-stick coating, stay-cool handle, induction compatible. Dishwasher safe. PFOA-free.

products.name: Bamboo Cutting Board Set
products.description: Set of 3 eco-friendly bamboo cutting boards in small, medium, and large. Juice groove, easy-grip handles.

products.name: Wireless Charging Pad 15W
products.description: Fast wireless charger compatible with Qi devices. LED indicator, anti-slip surface, ultra-thin design.

products.name: Slim Fit Chino Trousers
products.description: Stretch cotton-blend slim chinos with 4-way flexibility. Smart-casual look, wrinkle-resistant fabric.

products.name: Oversized Graphic Hoodie
products.description: 400gsm heavyweight fleece hoodie with a dropped shoulder fit, kangaroo pocket, and ribbed cuffs. Unisex sizing.
